name: nutricrew
description: NutriCrew — social nutrition game for Telegram

scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -n server,miniapp -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w miniapp"
scripts.build: npm run build -w miniapp && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w miniapp
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio minio-init
scripts.pitch:pdf: npm install --prefix docs && npm run pitch:pdf --prefix docs
